Onboarding is rough for new teammates

Took our PMs three weeks to feel productive. Notifications are a firehose by default and figuring out which views matter is a learn-by-suffering exercise. Not a deal-breaker but not love.
Sarah K. April 12, 2026 23

Pricing creeps as the team grows

Started at $10/seat, now we're at $25 and the next tier is $32. The features we actually use haven't expanded much; we're just paying more for the same thing.
Marcus L. April 15, 2026 47

Crashes when I have too many tabs open

Browser tab eats 1GB+ of RAM on a normal-sized board. We have 50 active projects; opening three at once browser-crashes Safari.
Dana P. April 18, 2026 12

Love it (4-star review for filter test)

Works great for our team. Should be filtered out by min/max star config.
Happy User April 20, 2026 3
